decisions.title: Baseline for remaining PRD-0002 gates
decisions.description: G4/G5/G6 are already done. G3 has implementation present (scripts/smoke-compose.sh + make smoke), but PRD still marks it TODO. G7 is technically green via promtool check rules. Remaining execution focus: run compose smoke evidence (G3), validate fresh-db migrations (G8/G9), generate c4 pipeline soak evidence file (G2), run make ci (G1), then update PRD status fields (G10/G11 readiness).
alternatives: Start directly with make ci before operational gates (rejected: would not produce missing gate-specific evidence).

decisions.title: Execution order to minimize regressions and wasted runtime
decisions.description: Run docker-backed operational gates first (G3/G8/G9) on fresh volumes, then soak evidence (G2), then full CI gate (G1). Apply PRD/status updates only after evidence is complete to avoid premature documentation drift.
alternatives: Update PRD checklist before command evidence (rejected: risks truth drift).

decisions.title: Operational gates executed on fresh compose state
decisions.description: Executed make down -v, make up-core, make smoke, validated migration tables in ClickHouse and Timescale, executed make soak-pipeline, and ran make ci successfully. This closed G1,G2,G3,G7,G8,G9 and enabled G10 doc promotion.
alternatives: Partial gate execution without fresh-volume reset (rejected due weaker migration evidence).

decisions.title: Gate 11 is release-branch constrained
decisions.description: All executable gates in workspace are validated and documented. Gate 11 (tag v0.1.0-stable created on main) remains pending because current branch is feat/context-calibration; tagging must be performed on main during release cut.
alternatives: Create v0.1.0-stable tag on non-main branch (rejected as it violates PRD criterion).
